<!-- Thanks for contributing to CoreCraft (java-foundations)! -->

## What & why
<!-- Briefly: what this adds/fixes and why. -->

## Type
- [ ] New kata (code) + tests
- [ ] New concept (`docs/concepts/*.md`)
- [ ] New visualization (`docs/visualizations/*.html`)
- [ ] Fix / improvement

## Checklist
- [ ] `mvn test` is green (for code changes)
- [ ] New kata is built **from scratch** (no third-party libs for the core)
- [ ] Concept starts with a `# title` and a `> one-line summary`
- [ ] Visualization uses the shared `style.css` / `var(--color-*)` (works in light & dark)
- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
